Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Show HN: TurboQuant-WASM – Google's vector quantization in the browser 68 upvotes, 2 comments
  2. Scientists observe an immune signaling complex forming inside cells 41 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. The Indie Internet Index – submit your favorite sites 22 upvotes, 1 comments
  4. iNaturalist 501 upvotes, 122 comments
  5. Show HN: A game where you build a GPU 184 upvotes, 40 comments
  6. What life looks like on the most remote inhabited island 51 upvotes, 8 comments
  7. Some Unusual Trees 194 upvotes, 53 comments
  8. Simple self-distillation improves code generation 391 upvotes, 118 comments
  9. Artemis II crew take “spectacular” image of Earth 968 upvotes, 326 comments
  10. Why the Most Valuable Things You Know Are Things You Cannot Say 38 upvotes, 8 comments
  11. Training mRNA Language Models Across 25 Species for $165 67 upvotes, 21 comments
  12. The most-disliked people in the publishing industry 75 upvotes, 25 comments
  13. Apple approves driver that lets Nvidia eGPUs work with Arm Macs 125 upvotes, 48 comments
  14. OpenClaw privilege escalation vulnerability 488 upvotes, 226 comments
  15. Notes from from Butterick's Practical Typography 7 upvotes, 0 comments
  16. Components of a Coding Agent 78 upvotes, 29 comments
  17. The Cathedral, the Bazaar, and the Winchester Mystery House 111 upvotes, 47 comments
  18. Plague Ships 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  19. Author of "Careless People" banned from saying anything negative about Meta 440 upvotes, 287 comments
  20. Claude Code Found a Linux Vulnerability Hidden for 23 Years 265 upvotes, 166 comments
  21. Deafness reversed: One injection restores hearing in just weeks – ScienceDaily 15 upvotes, 4 comments
  22. Tell HN: Anthropic no longer allowing Claude Code subscriptions to use OpenClaw 955 upvotes, 731 comments
  23. When legal sports betting surges, so do Americans' financial problems 54 upvotes, 31 comments
  24. Show HN: sllm – Split a GPU node with other developers, unlimited tokens 51 upvotes, 30 comments
  25. Electrical Transformer Manufacturing Is Throttling the Electrified Future 23 upvotes, 12 comments
  26. 12k AI-generated blog posts added in a single commit 117 upvotes, 104 comments
  27. Show HN: Running local OpenClaw together with remote agents in an open network 7 upvotes, 2 comments
  28. German men 18-45 need military permit for extended stays abroad 216 upvotes, 341 comments
  29. Sopwith 3 upvotes, 1 comments
  30. Mbodi AI (YC P25) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 3:00am, 5 April 2026. Source here.
